items.title: Bank Stocks Hold Gains. Fed Sees Improved Growth, but More Rate Cuts.
items.description: Bank stocks are moving higher in the wake of the Federal Reserve rate decision, which included forecasts for firmer growth with largely steady inflation.  Goldman Sachs, the top-performing Dow stock of the year, was 0.8% higher at $790.44.  Fed officials lifted their 2025 GDP forecast to 1.6% from 1.4%, and nudged their 2026 estimate to 1.8% from 1.6%.

items.title: Is JPMorgan's Recent Dividend Hike Enough to Buy the Stock?
items.description: JPM boosts its dividend for the second time this year, rewarding shareholders. Is the stock worth betting on based on this dividend income?

items.title: JPMorgan predicts small-caps to lead with 30–60% outperformance vs large-caps
items.description: Investing.com -- JPMorgan analysts see small- and mid-cap stocks entering a period of significant outperformance relative to large-caps, forecasting gains of up to 60% over the next three years.
